## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

Explain how this was tested.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and scoped.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if setup, usage, or behavior changed.
- [ ] `python -m py_compile main_gpt.py` passes when Python is available.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, `.env`, private logs, generated videos, or local media assets are included.
- [ ] Licensing is clear for any added third-party code, media, or assets.
